formula_or_rule: Count how many of the 8 PERC criteria are met (each met criterion = 1 point): age >= 50; HR >= 100 bpm; SpO2 on room air < 95%; unilateral leg swelling; hemoptysis; recent surgery or trauma (within 4 weeks requiring general anesthesia); prior PE or DVT; hormone use (oral contraceptives, HRT, or estrogenic hormone use in males or females). Score = number of criteria met (0-8). PERC-negative (rules out PE) only if score = 0.
